questions.question: Explain the significance of paper prototypes in the UI/UX design process, highlighting their role in facilitating iterative design refinement and user testing. (10 marks)

A designer creates a low-fidelity prototype of a mobile app, which is then reviewed by stakeholders. What are the key factors that the designer should consider when deciding whether to increase the fidelity of the prototype based on the feedback received? (15 marks)

An engineer from the software development team is involved in the UI/UX design process, providing input on the technical feasibility of different design options. What are some essential considerations for the engineer to keep in mind when integrating their technical knowledge with the design process, and how can they contribute to the development of a successful product? (20 marks)
